scenario: Reusable generated data-list add-readiness baseline for analytics demo apps
rules: ListModel.Type must be 1 for data lists.
ListModel.ListType must be 1 for generated Type 1 data lists.
The native Title field keeps FieldName Title, FieldType Text, Type input, Status 0, IsSystem true, IsIndex true, and FieldIndex 0.
FieldName storage prefixes must align with FieldType: Text* -> Text, Datetime* -> Datetime/date, Decimal* -> Decimal/number, Bigint* -> Bigint/integer, Bit* -> Bit/boolean.
Seeded ListDatas keys must resolve to valid FieldName keys or allowed system metadata.
Seeded date values should use ISO-like date strings for date fields.
Seeded numeric/currency values should use numeric strings or numbers for numeric fields.
Analytics demo apps should run strict import-readiness before handoff and must not claim populated analytics proof from empty controls.
redaction: Synthetic normalized example only; no source IDs, user names, customer data, tenant IDs, emails, or raw payloads.
